title: Phase 7 — Externe Integration Hardening
description: YouTrack/Sentry-Sync robust, Outbox-Consumer, DLQ-UI, pgvector-Routing, Bug Heatmap, KPI-Dashboard.
definition_of_done: Outbox-Consumer mit Exponential Backoff verarbeitet Events, DLQ-Requeue funktioniert, pgvector-Routing bei Confidence >= 0.85 auto-assigned, Bug Heatmap im Nexus Grid, KPI-Dashboard zeigt 6 Kern-KPIs.
